title: Train Ticket Booking (IRCTC)
shortDescription: Official portal for booking Indian Railway train tickets, checking PNR status, and train schedules.
eligibility: Anyone with a valid Indian mobile number and email ID can register.
fees: Varies based on train class and distance.
stepsToApply: Visit the official IRCTC website.
Click on 'Register' to create a new account or 'Login' if you already have one.
Enter your travel route (From and To stations) and date of journey.
Select your preferred train and class, then click 'Book Now'.
Enter passenger details, complete the payment, and download your ticket.

faqs.question: Can I book a ticket without an account?
faqs.answer: No, an IRCTC account is mandatory for booking tickets online.

title: Passport Application (Passport Seva)
shortDescription: Official portal for applying for a new passport, passport renewal, reissue, and related passport services in India.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen eligible for a passport under the Passport Act.
fees: Varies depending on passport type, number of pages, and Tatkal/Normal service.
stepsToApply: Visit the official Passport Seva Portal.
Register a new account or log in.
Select 'Apply for Fresh Passport/Re-issue of Passport'.
Fill in the application form online.
Pay the applicable fee.
Book an appointment at your nearest Passport Seva Kendra (PSK).
Visit the PSK with original documents for verification.
Track your application status online until passport dispatch.

faqs.question: Is Aadhaar mandatory for a passport?
faqs.answer: No. Aadhaar is one of several accepted identity and address proof documents.

title: Income Tax e-Filing
shortDescription: Official portal for filing Income Tax Returns (ITR), checking refund status, and accessing various income tax services.
eligibility: Individuals, businesses, and organizations required or eligible to file Income Tax Returns in India.
fees: No government fee for filing ITR on the official portal. Professional charges may apply if using tax consultants.
stepsToApply: Visit the official Income Tax e-Filing portal.
Log in using your PAN/User ID.
Select 'File Income Tax Return'.
Choose the applicable Assessment Year and ITR form.
Enter income, deductions, and tax details.
Verify the information and submit the return.
Complete e-Verification using Aadhaar OTP, Net Banking, or other available methods.

faqs.question: Can I file my Income Tax Return for free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Eligible taxpayers can file their Income Tax Return free of cost through the official Income Tax e-Filing portal.
